meta.title: Interactius · Brand Guidelines 2026
meta.description: Living, AI-ready brand guidelines for Interactius. Logotype, typography, colour palette and visual universe.

intro.lead: This platform is not a set of static rules or a catalogue of cosmetic restrictions. It works as the technical and conceptual source of truth on which every brand decision is built. Its function is concrete: equip our human team and our automated systems with the criteria for decisions aligned with the identity.
intro.body: The sections that follow lay out the parameters that define how we operate, how we structure visually and how our voice modulates. This document is a living system, designed to be executed with the same rigour across every brand decision. It applies whether we shape a product or feed directives to artificial intelligence models in production.

tonoMarca.title: Brand voice
tonoMarca.voiceBody: We don't write to display our own critical thinking, we write to activate the critical thinking of the reader. Our voice doesn't seek applause or complacency; it aims to shift the frame of the conversation. We position ourselves as an exploratory perspective with the rigour of someone who knows where they stand.
tonoMarca.ax1Body: We get to the point without corporate detours or filler intros that delay the central argument. We say things sharply, but every assertion is backed by solid criteria and a defensible argument.
tonoMarca.ax2Body: We speak between real people, not from corporation to corporation nor from platform to anonymous platform. The tone is accessible and human (Tribe), while keeping the precise distance technical rigour demands.
tonoMarca.ax3Body: We question market assumptions and obvious answers, but always from the honesty of proposing a better working hypothesis.
tonoMarca.ax4Body: We strip out visual noise and literary ornament so the content can breathe in every editorial decision. Sophistication lives in the precision of the chosen word, not in the volume of text.
tonoMarca.redBody: To preserve character, Interactius explicitly rejects the wildcard vocabulary of traditional consultancies. We replace empty concepts with concrete descriptions.
tonoMarca.red1Rule: Replace with the actual technical solution or change being proposed.
tonoMarca.red2Rule: Replace with "integrated context", "system analysis" or describe the variables that coexist.
tonoMarca.red3Rule: Describe the impact or anomaly without using the adjective.
tonoMarca.red5Rule: Remove entirely. Use direct language: "enable", "team criterion", "collaboration".
tonoMarca.punc1: The use of exclamation marks (!) is strictly forbidden. Emphasis is achieved through argument, never by altering punctuation.
tonoMarca.punc2: Avoid ellipses (…) as a rhetorical device. Sentences end with a firm full stop.

concepto.title: Brand concept
concepto.part1P1: The word's morphology demands that the stress and rhythmic weight fall strictly on the second weak vowel (Interactíus). To counter the reader's natural inertia of shifting the stress toward the central syllable, the logotype intervenes the typography by inserting a macron over the final i.
concepto.macronDef: /'makron/ a written or printed mark (¯) used to indicate a long vowel in some languages, or a stressed vowel in verse.
concepto.part1P2: This graphic element is not ornamental; it acts as a phonetic regulator that locks in the correct cadence and deliberately shifts the visual axis of attention toward the margin of the word.
concepto.part2P1: The elongation of the i's dot to form the macron breaks the typography's upper line and defines the system's behaviour. This vertical stretch delimits the transition zone — the liminal space — and is established as the primary vector that governs movements, transitions and element loading in the digital interface, turning an acoustic correction into the visual signature of the brand.

logo.verticalLead: The logo can be set vertically to occupy the lateral margin of a digital or printed piece.
logo.verticalBody: This variant reinforces the liminal concept of the visual system: the brand does not dominate the centre, it supports the edge. We operate in the space between the piece and its boundary, where the reader chooses to enter or exit the narrative.
logo.verticalApplications: It appears in the lateral sidebar of web interfaces, in the marginal column of presentations and on the vertical cover of documents.
logo.title: Primary mark
logo.isotipoConceptBody: Two masses drawing closer. The line that divides without separating, the squares represent the minimal presence in the liminal place.

areaReserva.title: Clear space
areaReserva.body: To guarantee the legibility of the logotype, we must always maintain a field of free space. The clear space isolates the logotype from competing graphic elements — text or imagery — that can pull attention away from the mark.
areaReserva.measure: This area is measured using the height of the lowercase 'a' in the logotype. No other graphic elements, typography, rules or images may appear within this clear space.

tamanoMinimo.title: Minimum size
tamanoMinimo.body: The minimum size refers to the smallest allowed dimensions of the Interactius logotype.

usosIncorrectos.title: Do/Dont's
usosIncorrectos.body: The Interactius logotype must not be adjusted or edited in any way. Below are examples of usage that is not permitted:

rules.2: Don't place elements inside the clear space.
rules.5: Don't place the logotype over an image without legibility.
rules.6: Don't alter any individual element of the logotype.

tipografia.title: Typography
tipografia.brandBody: Our identity is built on IBM Plex Mono, a typeface that reflects the precision and technical character of the brand and underpins the construction of the logotype.
tipografia.brandNotes: Prefer Regular and Semibold weights for highlights. Avoid italics.
tipografia.contrastBody: IBM Plex Serif is the contrast typeface of the visual system, bringing a humanist and sophisticated dimension to the identity. Used for headlines and key highlights.
tipografia.contrastNotes: Prefer Light and Regular weights for highlights. Avoid italics.

color.title: Colour palette
color.baseBody: The institutional palette is built on neutral, warm tones that reinforce the sober and sophisticated character of the identity. These colours set the brand's visual atmosphere, prioritising legibility and visual ease through soft contrast and a contemporary editorial aesthetic.
color.accentBody: An accent colour system for identifying and segmenting the company's services. Each tone acts as a specific visual identifier, without breaking the overall coherence of the system.

sistemaTexto.title: Type system
sistemaTexto.lead: This table documents the actual typography tokens we use to build every digital interface for Interactius.
sistemaTexto.body: Each level defines a concrete use, a recommended typeface family and a set of canonical weights. Anyone who designs, develops or trains an AI model with this manual should operate on these tokens, not on arbitrary sizes.

universoVisual.title: Visual universe
universoVisual.lead: Image treatment is grounded in the liminal, that is, in the space of transition between two states. We work the concept of the In-between as a void that carries meaning instead of erasing it.
universoVisual.body: We prioritise conceptual photography that captures movement, ambiguity and the pause that separates one decision from the next. We don't seek the literal — we generate an atmosphere in which technical precision and artistic sensibility coexist. Images should act as extensions of negative space, letting the brand breathe and work 'in the in-between'.
universoVisual.copyPromptLabel: Copy technical image prompt for AI

sistemaGrafico.title: Graphic system
sistemaGrafico.lead: This section gathers the system's graphic resources, starting with the shapes associated to each service.
sistemaGrafico.body: Each shape embodies the character of the service it represents and shares its accent colour. The catalogue grows as the brand adds patterns, decorative marks or any other operational graphic resource.

aplicaciones.title: Applications
aplicaciones.lead: This section gathers mockups showing the brand applied to real pieces of the identity system.

movimiento.title: Motion
movimiento.lead: Motion is not decoration: it is the vehicle through which the brand enters, transitions and exits every piece.
movimiento.body: Every curve and duration in the system is designed to sustain the liminal feel: entering without noise, exiting without truncating attention. Whoever designs or animates a piece for Interactius should work with these easings, not with curves invented on the spot.
movimiento.videoFallback: Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

prompts.title: AI prompts
prompts.soon: Coming soon · copy-on-click prompts to generate imagery, copy and presentations that respect the brand.

iaReady.title: Operating manual for AI
iaReady.lead: This manual isn't only read, it also runs: any language model can ingest it and apply the brand.
iaReady.body: Copy the full prompt and paste it into NotebookLM, Claude Projects or a custom GPT as system instructions. The rest of the work is done by the model, with the brand loaded as a hard layer over any later request.
